parsing_approach: Lexical extractor (JSP is not well-formed XML, so no real parser is possible with stdlib). JSP and HTML comments are masked before matching, so commented-out includes/forms are never extracted. This tool is honest about being lexical — it targets a fixed set of constructs rather than pretending to parse the page.
extracts: custom taglib tag usage counts resolved to taglib URIs
HTML forms with action/method, links with hrefs
known_limitations: Lexical: no HTML DOM, no nesting of extracted constructs.
Attributes using unquoted values or runtime expressions as attribute values may be missed.
Scriptlet Java code is counted, not parsed (pair with java-structure ideas manually if scriptlets matter).
Dynamic includes built from EL expressions are recorded as-is, unresolved.
